---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for DeepRouter
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: pjwan2
---

## Problem Statement

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe it clearly without jumping straight to a solution.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you have in mind. If you have implementation ideas, include them here.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why did you rule them out?

## Use Case

Describe the specific use case or workload this feature would unlock.

## Additional Context

Any relevant links, research, prior art, or examples.
